Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails for Grace Yamamoto's message to Darnell using search_emails (query related to "Elena" or "emergency" or "cover" or similar) to find the handoff email identifying the 4 loans: LN-2026-00607 (Lauren Bennett, conventional, Amy Chen's borrower), LN-2026-00614 (Amara Jackson, conventional jumbo, Keisha Williams' borrower), LN-2026-00606 (Harrison Brooks, conventional, James Thornton's borrower), and LN-2026-00603 (Janet Torres, conventional, Natasha Okafor's borrower).
- Look up loan details in the LOS for each of the 4 loans using mortgage_los_search_loans or mortgage_los_get_loan (query related to "LN-2026-00607" or "Bennett" or similar) to find: current statuses (all in processing), assigned LOs, rate lock info (LN-2026-00607 rate lock expiration April 18 per LOS), and document status for each file.
- Check LOS conditions for each loan using mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id for each of the 4 loans) to discover: (1) LN-2026-00607 has 2 outstanding conditions (W-2 current year — requested from borrower 4/17, no response; most recent paystub — borrower sent expired paystub from January); (2) LN-2026-00614 has 1 outstanding condition (appraisal reconsideration — value $870,000 vs purchase price $980,000, gap of $110,000, need ROV filing or price renegotiation); (3) LN-2026-00606 has 4 outstanding conditions (bank statements, LOX for $8,200 deposit, VOE, HOI binder) — but Elena's reply email shows she already submitted 2 of them; (4) LN-2026-00603 has TRID timing concern.
- Search Elena's emails for correspondence about each loan using search_emails (query related to "LN-2026-00607" or "Bennett" or "rate lock" or similar, and repeat for each loan) to discover: (1) Camille Foster's urgent email flagging LN-2026-00607 rate lock expiring April 13 with 2 outstanding conditions, extension would cost $425; (2) Amara Jackson's unanswered email from April 7 worried about the low appraisal on LN-2026-00614 ($870K vs $980K purchase price); (3) Flagstar's conditional approval email for LN-2026-00606 listing 4 conditions; (4) Elena's reply to Flagstar showing she already submitted bank statements and deposit LOX (tax refund confirmation) — this changes the picture to only 2 remaining conditions (VOE and HOI); (5) Elena's email to Nadia Osman flagging CD timing concern on LN-2026-00603 — closing scheduled April 16, CD must go out by EOD Monday April 11 to meet TRID 3-business-day window.
- Search Slack #loan-processing and #compliance-alerts using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history (query related to "LN-2026-00607" or "Bennett" or "Elena" or similar) to find messages posted by Robert Calloway: (1) message in #loan-processing flagging LN-2026-00607 lock expiration on 4/13, Elena hasn't responded about missing docs; (2) message in #loan-processing about low appraisal on LN-2026-00614 ($870K vs $980K), Keisha needs to talk to borrower; (3) message in #loan-processing asking Elena for update on Brooks LN-2026-00606 conditions, no response; (4) message in #compliance-alerts about CD timing for LN-2026-00603 (closing 4/16, CD needs to go out by EOD 4/11); (5) Elena's threaded reply about waiting on final title fees from Tryon Title / Barbara Hensley for LN-2026-00603.
- Search CRM deals for each borrower using crm_search_deals or crm_get_deal (query related to "Bennett" or "Jackson" or "Brooks" or "Torres" or similar) to verify deal stage alignment with LOS status for each of the 4 loans.
- Send an email using send_email (sender: darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipient: camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com) about the rate lock on LN-2026-00607 (Lauren Bennett). Content should reference the lock expiration date (April 13 per Camille's email, April 18 per LOS), the 2 outstanding conditions (W-2 and paystub), and request guidance on whether an extension is needed or if the lock has already lapsed.
- Send an email using send_email (sender: darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipient: amy.chen@keystonemortgage.com) with a status update on LN-2026-00607 (Lauren Bennett): rate lock expiring/expired, 2 outstanding conditions (W-2 and paystub), need borrower to provide docs immediately.
- Send an email using send_email (sender: darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipient: keisha.williams@keystonemortgage.com) with a status update on LN-2026-00614 (Amara Jackson): low appraisal ($870K vs $980K purchase price, $110K gap), borrower emailed April 7 with no reply from Elena, need LO to contact borrower about options (ROV, price renegotiation, or additional cash).
- Send an email using send_email (sender: darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipient: james.thornton@keystonemortgage.com) with a status update on LN-2026-00606 (Harrison Brooks): 4 original conditions from Flagstar, but Elena already submitted bank statements and deposit LOX (2 cleared), 2 remaining (VOE and HOI). Need LO to coordinate VOE and borrower to get HOI binder.
- Send an email using send_email (sender: darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipient: natasha.okafor@keystonemortgage.com) with a status update on LN-2026-00603 (Janet Torres): TRID timing concern, CD was supposed to go out by EOD April 11 for April 16 closing. Need to determine current status and escalate if CD still hasn't been sent.
- Add a loan activity note to LN-2026-00607 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id for LN-2026-00607) documenting that Darnell Price is taking over the file from Elena Marchetti, rate lock expiring April 18 per LOS, 2 outstanding conditions (W-2 and paystub).
- Add a loan activity note to LN-2026-00614 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id for LN-2026-00614) documenting that Darnell Price is taking over the file from Elena Marchetti, low appraisal situation ($870K vs $980K), unanswered borrower email from April 7.
- Add a loan activity note to LN-2026-00606 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id for LN-2026-00606) documenting that Darnell Price is taking over the file from Elena Marchetti, 4 conditions from Flagstar (2 already submitted by Elena), 2 remaining (VOE and HOI).
- Add a loan activity note to LN-2026-00603 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id for LN-2026-00603) documenting that Darnell Price is taking over the file from Elena Marchetti, TRID timing concern, CD was due by April 11 for April 16 closing.
- Post a summary message in #loan-processing Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C002) letting the team know Darnell is covering Elena's four priority files, listing each loan with its critical deadlines/issues: LN-2026-00607 rate lock expiration, LN-2026-00614 appraisal gap, LN-2026-00606 outstanding conditions, LN-2026-00603 TRID/CD timing concern.
- Write a tracking document to the filesystem using filesystem_write_file listing each of the four loans with their key deadlines, outstanding conditions, and immediate next steps.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
